TestStep.description: Select Return Transaction at Sale Screen
Select most recent account from search results
Select most recent account from search results
Select New Special Order at Special Order Lookup screen
Select SO Shipping Type - To Customer
Select SO Shipping Type - To Store
Select Done on Special Order Screen
Enter the expected date for the item
Select Customer in the transaction to Ship
Select Enter on Layaway Customer Deposit
Select New Special Order at Special Order Lookup screen
Select SO Shipping Type - To Store
Enter the expected date for the item
Select Cancel Transaction Button that has item in the transaction.
Accept Item not in purchase history
Accept Warranty ID not on file
Accept Item not in purchase history
Select Return Transaction at Sale Screen
Select New Special Order at Special Order Lookup screen
Select SO Shipping Type - Direct To Customer
Select the first item in the list
Select the first item in the list
Select Add Item on Item Maintenance
Select Cancel Transaction at Sale Screen
Enter valid Merchandise Credit Card No !{cardNo}
Accept Item not in purchase history
Skip to enter Paid Out Bardcode
Select Amount Due on Sale Screen
Select OK on Change Due - Cash Drawer Prompt
Select OK on Change Due - Cash Drawer Prompt
Select Decline Warranty on Warranty Plan

Assertion.description: Assert that the current transaction is null

TestStep.description: Select Return Transaction at Sale Screen
Select Return Transaction at Sale Screen
